metadata.summary: Airtable spreadsheet-database for project tracking and data management.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to airtable.com/create/tokens
2. Click 'Create new token'
3. Name your token and select the scopes and bases you need
4. Click 'Create token' and copy the pat... value
